name: keyzori-workspace
description: Self-hosted software license management server with an operator CLI and client SDK.
author: Keyzori contributors

scripts.dev:server:binary: bun run build:server && bun run server
scripts.build: bun run build:server && bun run build:sdk
scripts.smoke:packages: bun -e "import { LicenseClient } from './apps/sdk/dist/index.js'; if (typeof LicenseClient !== 'function') throw new Error('SDK export missing')" && bun run cli:binary --help
scripts.test:coverage:core: bun test --config bunfig.coverage.toml --coverage apps/server/src/test/AdminService.test.ts apps/server/src/test/HandshakeService.test.ts && bun test --config bunfig.coverage.toml --coverage apps/sdk/src/test/sdk.test.ts
scripts.test:live: bun run build:server && bun run --cwd apps/server ../../tests/liveFlow.ts
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/server typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/sdk typecheck && bunx tsc --project tests/tsconfig.json
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run test:coverage:core && bun run release:verify && bun run lint
scripts.check:server: bun run --cwd apps/server typecheck && bun run test:server
scripts.check:cli: bun run --cwd apps/server typecheck && bun run test:cli
scripts.check:sdk: bun run --cwd apps/sdk typecheck && bun run test:sdk
